displayName: Azure Static Web Apps should be connected to an approved GitHub organization
description: Audits or denies Azure Static Web Apps whose repositoryUrl does not begin with one of the approved GitHub organization prefixes. Apps connected to repos outside approved organizations bypass supply-chain controls and source-code governance. Apps with no repositoryUrl (e.g. deployed via CI/CD without a GitHub integration) are excluded. Set the effect to Deny once approved organizations are fully inventoried.

metadata.description: List of approved GitHub organization names (without the https://github.com/ prefix). Example: ["myorg", "myorg-sandbox"]
Audit logs a compliance warning without blocking; Deny blocks the request; Disabled turns the policy off. Set to Deny once approved organizations are fully inventoried.
